## Type of change

<!-- Tick one or more -->

- [ ] Bug fix (a change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New skill or plugin
- [ ] Improvement to an existing skill
- [ ] Documentation-only change
- [ ] Tooling, CI, or repository hygiene

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] CI validation passes locally (`marketplace.json`, `plugin.json`, and `SKILL.md` frontmatter are valid).
- [ ] I have updated [`CHANGELOG.md`](../CHANGELOG.md) under `Unreleased`.
- [ ] If this changes a plugin's behaviour, I have bumped its `version` in the plugin manifest and the marketplace manifest.
- [ ] I have not included any private contact information in public files.
